summary: Comprehensive self-audit of the implementation plan, identifying 6 conflicts/bugs and 4 improvement suggestions. Covers: validate_phase_plan_sub_keys hardcoded biography excerpt builder, _extract_chapter_blueprint fallback logic incompatible with battle blueprints, style_data not currently passed to _run_shared_fw_pipeline, resume flow pipeline_features loss, apply_chapter_splits threshold mismatch for battle, _NICHE_OUTLINE_FIELDS gap. Also proposes: niche-aware _build_excerpt, config-driven _always_keys, passing style_data param, and separate apply_chapter_splits thresholds per niche.
